variations.compliment: Block Sherpa looks great - I had a peek at your GitHub org and the range of repos, from reth and go-ethereum to a clean Next.js + Tailwind + Shadcn SaaS boilerplate, is really impressive.

Hello Jose,

Thanks for checking out Polymer! Block Sherpa looks great - I had a peek at your GitHub org and the range of repos, from reth and go-ethereum to a clean Next.js + Tailwind + Shadcn SaaS boilerplate, is really impressive.

Happy to answer any questions you might have about Polymer.

Cheers,
Jessica
